name: loom
description: Persistent symbol index for AI coding agents. Tree-sitter indexes your codebase into SQLite. Agents search by name/keyword and get summaries + signatures instantly — zero LLM cost.

loom.description: 21 code intelligence tools — search, context packets, blast radius, sessions, topology insights, token savings tracking. DB resolved: LOOM_DB_PATH env → ~/.loom/projects/{git-root-name}.db → ~/.loom/loom.db.
